problem id: 546b90de
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT ROT(7)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00011110 -> 10001111
  11011001 -> 01111100
  11001100 -> 11101110
  11101100 -> 01111110
  00001011 -> 01010111
  00000110 -> 11100111
  10110000 -> 01111101
  10001111 -> 01000111

query: 11001110
predicted answer: 11100111
